trans-unit.source: Approval of an Imprest Memo is requested.
trans-unit.target: Approval of a sales document is requested.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for an Imprest Memo has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: An approval request for a sales document is cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An Imprest Memo has been released.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType ImpMemoReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a payment is requested.
trans-unit.target: Approval of a sales document is requested.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a payment has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: An approval request for a sales document is cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt
Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PaymentsReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a Payroll Period is requested.
trans-unit.target: Approval of a sales document is requested.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a Payroll Period has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: An approval request for a sales document is cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: A Payroll Period has been released.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType PayPeriodReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: Approval of a Leave Application is requested.
trans-unit.target: Approval of a sales document is requested.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppSendForApprovalEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: An approval request for a Leave Application has been canceled.
trans-unit.target: An approval request for a sales document is cancelled.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppApprReqCancelledEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: A Leave Application has been released.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Dynasoft Workflow Events - NamedType LeaveAppReleasedEventDescTxt

trans-unit.source: There are no purchase review documents to process. Please select the appropriate Decision and enter Target No. to process documents.
trans-unit.target: There are no purchase review documents to process. Please select the appropriate Decision and enter Target No. to process documents.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText01

trans-unit.source: No line were eligible for posting encumbrances - check line statuses.
trans-unit.target: No line were eligible for posting encumbrances - check line statuses.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText02

trans-unit.source: The Purchase Order %1 you are appending to does not exist.
trans-unit.target: The Purchase Order %1 you are appending to does not exist.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText03

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a %1 purchase line.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a %1 purchase line.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText04

trans-unit.source: Advanced Budgeting is not licensed or activated in Source Codes.
trans-unit.target: Advanced Budgeting is not licensed or activated in Source Codes.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText05

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a submitted for approval purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a submitted for approval purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText06

trans-unit.source: Reversed Requisition Fulfillment & Canceled line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: Reversed Requisition Fulfillment & Canceled line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText07

trans-unit.source: Use Delete instead of Cancel Line for purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: Use Delete instead of Cancel Line for purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText08

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a new purchase line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a new purchase line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText09
Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText10
Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText11

trans-unit.source: There are no lines with status New and an Amount to check.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines with status New and an Amount to check.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText12
Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText13

trans-unit.source: Requisition %1 has submitted lines - cannot be deleted.
trans-unit.target: Requisition %1 has submitted lines - cannot be deleted.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText14

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to cancel for Line %1. Delete line instead.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to cancel for Line %1. Delete line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText15

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText16

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a Deposit %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Deposit %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText17

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to check.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to check.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText18

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to cancel.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to cancel.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText19

trans-unit.source: There are outstanding Orders that must be fully Invoiced or Canceled first.
trans-unit.target: There are outstanding Orders that must be fully Invoiced or Canceled first.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText20

trans-unit.source: Should Blanket Order %1, Line No. %2 be re-encumbered?
trans-unit.target: Should Blanket Order %1, Line No. %2 be re-encumbered?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText21

trans-unit.source: Blanket Order Status %1 is not valid
trans-unit.target: Blanket Order Status %1 is not valid
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText22

trans-unit.source: The line has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.target: The line has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText23

trans-unit.source: Cancel Line has been stopped. Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: Cancel Line has been stopped. Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText24

trans-unit.source: Posting is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.target: Posting is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText25

trans-unit.source: Processing is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.target: Processing is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText26

trans-unit.source: No lines were eligible for posting commitments - check line statuses.
trans-unit.target: No lines were eligible for posting commitments - check line statuses.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText27

trans-unit.source: Purchase tolerance check failed. Document No.=%1, Line No.=%2.
trans-unit.target: Purchase tolerance check failed. Document No.=%1, Line No.=%2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText28

trans-unit.source: Reclassification not permitted for document %1, line %2.
trans-unit.target: Reclassification not permitted for document %1, line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText29

trans-unit.source: Status must be Approval Pending, Transfer Budget Pending or Disapproved.
trans-unit.target: Status must be Approval Pending, Transfer Budget Pending or Disapproved.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText30

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to reset.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to reset.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText31

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a new sales line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a new sales line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText32

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a %1 sales line.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a %1 sales line.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText33

trans-unit.source: There are %1 failed validations. Preview Distributions to resolve.
trans-unit.target: There are %1 failed validations. Preview Distributions to resolve.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText34

trans-unit.source: The document has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.target: The document has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText36
Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText37

trans-unit.source: You cannot reset document a %1 %2 that is %3 %4.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to cancel for %1 %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText38

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a %1 %2 that is %3 %4.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Requisition Management - NamedType SNText39

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Imprest Memo %1.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to release for the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.target: The approval process must be cancelled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Imprest Memo - NamedType Text005

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Payment %1.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to release for the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.target: The approval process must be cancelled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Payments - NamedType Text005

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to release for Payroll Period %1.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to release for the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text001

trans-unit.source: This Period can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.target: This document can only be released when the approval process is complete.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text002

trans-unit.source: The approval process must be canceled or completed to reopen this period.
trans-unit.target: The approval process must be cancelled or completed to reopen this document.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text003

trans-unit.source: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unposted prepayment amounts on the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text004

trans-unit.source: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.target: There are unpaid prepayment invoices that are related to the document of type %1 with the number %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Release Payroll period - NamedType Text005

trans-unit.source: There are no purchase review documents to process. Please select the appropriate Decision and enter Target No. to process documents.
trans-unit.target: There are no purchase review documents to process. Please select the appropriate Decision and enter Target No. to process documents.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText01

trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a %1 purchase line.

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a submitted for approval purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.

trans-unit.target: Reversed Requisition Fulfillment & Canceled line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText07

trans-unit.source: Use Delete instead of Cancel Line for purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: Use Delete instead of Cancel Line for purchase line, Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText08

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a new purchase line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a new purchase line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText09
Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText10
Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText11

trans-unit.source: There are no lines with status New and an Amount to check.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines with status New and an Amount to check.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText12
Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText13

trans-unit.source: Requisition %1 has submitted lines - cannot be deleted.
trans-unit.target: Requisition %1 has submitted lines - cannot be deleted.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText14

trans-unit.source: There is nothing to cancel for Line %1. Delete line instead.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to cancel for Line %1. Delete line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText15

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText16

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a Deposit %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Deposit %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText17

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to check.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to check.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText18

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to cancel.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to cancel.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText19

trans-unit.source: There are outstanding Orders that must be fully Invoiced or Canceled first.
trans-unit.target: There are outstanding Orders that must be fully Invoiced or Canceled first.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText20

trans-unit.source: Should Blanket Order %1, Line No. %2 be re-encumbered?
trans-unit.target: Should Blanket Order %1, Line No. %2 be re-encumbered?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText21

trans-unit.source: Blanket Order Status %1 is not valid
trans-unit.target: Blanket Order Status %1 is not valid
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText22

trans-unit.source: The line has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.target: The line has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText23

trans-unit.source: Cancel Line has been stopped. Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.target: Cancel Line has been stopped. Document %1 Line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText24

trans-unit.source: Posting is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.target: Posting is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText25

trans-unit.source: Processing is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.target: Processing is not allowed for proposed Vendors. Vendor No.=%1.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText26

trans-unit.source: No lines were eligible for posting commitments - check line statuses.
trans-unit.target: No lines were eligible for posting commitments - check line statuses.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText27

trans-unit.source: Purchase tolerance check failed. Document No.=%1, Line No.=%2.
trans-unit.target: Purchase tolerance check failed. Document No.=%1, Line No.=%2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText28

trans-unit.source: Reclassification not permitted for document %1, line %2.
trans-unit.target: Reclassification not permitted for document %1, line %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText29

trans-unit.source: Status must be Approval Pending, Transfer Budget Pending or Disapproved.
trans-unit.target: Status must be Approval Pending, Transfer Budget Pending or Disapproved.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText30

trans-unit.source: There are no lines to reset.
trans-unit.target: There are no lines to reset.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText31

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a new sales line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a new sales line, Document %1 Line %2 - Delete Line instead.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText32

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a %1 sales line.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a %1 sales line.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText33

trans-unit.source: There are %1 failed validations. Preview Distributions to resolve.
trans-unit.target: There are %1 failed validations. Preview Distributions to resolve.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText34

trans-unit.source: The document has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.target: The document has been submitted for approval. Confirm cancellation?
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText36
Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText37

trans-unit.source: You cannot reset document a %1 %2 that is %3 %4.
trans-unit.target: There is nothing to cancel for %1 %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText38

trans-unit.source: You cannot cancel a %1 %2 that is %3 %4.
trans-unit.target: You cannot cancel a Requisition %1 Line %2 that is %3.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit Purchase Requisition MGT - NamedType SNText39
